## Summary

What does this change, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation or tooling
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
